title: onosma echioides var. hispida
intro: Onosma echioides var. hispida, also known as the prickly glionnet, is a plant species in the Apocynaceae family characterized by its hairy stems and leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Onosma echioides var. hispida include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, colds, and respiratory issues, as well as its use as an antiseptic to treat wounds and skin infections. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions and decoctions, which can be used to make teas, tinctures, and salves to harness its medicinal properties.
